question: What are the primary uses described for the 'Chrono-Modulator' or for the 'Bio-Harmonizer'?

answers.original:
The Chrono-Modulator is used to create temporary Reality Stabilizers in unstable zones.

### References

- [1] The Chrono-Modulator is a device used to create temporary Reality Stabilizers in unstable zones.

entities.name: Chrono-Modulator
entities.description: The Chrono-Modulator is a device used to create temporary Reality Stabilizers in unstable zones.

entities.name: Bio-Harmonic Feedback Systems
entities.description: Bio-harmonic feedback systems are advanced technologies used by musicians on Harmonius to enhance the emotional depth of their compositions.<SEP>Bio-harmonic feedback systems are advanced technologies used by musicians to enhance the emotional depth of their compositions.

entities.name: Chrono-Regulator
entities.description: The Chrono-Regulator is an ancient technological device discovered in desert ruins, designed to stabilize localized temporal distortions.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator is an ancient technological device discovered in desert ruins, designed to stabilize localized temporal distortions and prevent chaotic time anomalies.

entities.name: Temporal Distortions
entities.description: Temporal distortions are rare but dangerous phenomena that the Chrono-Regulator is designed to stabilize.<SEP>Temporal Distortions are chaotic time anomalies that the Chrono-Regulator is designed to stabilize.

relations.description: The Chrono-Modulator is used to create temporary Reality Stabilizers in unstable zones.
Many musicians on Harmonius use advanced bio-harmonic feedback systems to enhance the emotional depth of their compositions.
The Chrono-Regulator was discovered in the Desert Ruins.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator was discovered in the Desert Ruins.
The Chrono-Regulator is designed to stabilize Temporal Distortions.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator is designed to stabilize temporal distortions.
The Chrono-Regulator requires an External Power Source to function.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator requires an external power source to function.
Historians highly seek after artifacts like the Chrono-Regulator.<SEP>Historians highly seek after artifacts like the Chrono-Regulator.
The Chrono-Regulator is made of Unknown Alloys.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator is made of unknown alloys.
The Chrono-Regulator emits a Faint Hum when active.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator emits a faint hum when active.
The Chrono-Regulator was created by the Forgotten Civilization.
The creators' motives for designing the Chrono-Regulator remain unknown.
